title: E-Commerce Ecosystem
challenge: Client struggled with 70% cart abandonment and slow mobile speeds.
solution: Developed a custom Flask backend with a mobile-first UI.
benefit: Sales increased by 40% and page load speed improved.

title: AI Analytics Portal
challenge: Leadership couldn't track project impacts in real-time.
solution: Integrated Google Gemini AI to automate data reporting.
benefit: Saved 15 hours of manual reporting per week.

title: Automotive Branding
challenge: Local showroom had no digital presence to attract high-end car buyers.
solution: Designed a luxury minimalist website with high-fidelity car commercials.
benefit: Lead generation grew by 60% within the first three months.
